payload.author: Bri
payload.body: DEFERRED (not blocking the epic): the bootstrap path already works — GET /api/sync/pull with an empty `since` returns the full log, and clients paginate via the cursor + `more` flag (verified in SCP-134/142 tests). The snapshot OPTIMIZATION (a compacted replay-state blob + tail cursor to avoid streaming a very large log on first sync) is genuinely future work, only valuable once real logs are large. Left in backlog intentionally; pick up when log sizes warrant it. Design is in the SCP-123 proposal + ADR 0002.
